basics.name: Karen Gomes
basics.label: Software Developer
basics.summary: Software Developer, Master's student in Computer Science at UFMG, and Computer Science graduate from the Federal University of Alagoas (UFAL). I have worked with HTML5, CSS3, and Vanilla JS since 2017, and with ReactJS since 2018, plus NodeJS, Python, and WordPress (PHP), and the Low-Code platforms Liferay and Mendix.

work.name: Orion, Maceió - AL
work.summary: Software Developer at the Orion Laboratory Residency Program. Front End Coordinator for projects of the Alagoas State Secretariats (such as SETUR and Governança), using ReactJS, Hooks, Redux, NextJS, TypeScript, JavaScript, NodeJS, and Python.

work.name: Opikode, Rio de Janeiro - RJ
work.summary: Part of the Front End team using Liferay technology in SENAI CETIQT systems, such as Inova Moda Digital and Bioeconomia.

work.name: Suno Research, São Paulo - SP
work.summary: Full Stack Developer for a year and a half, focusing mostly on Front End. Until Jul/2022, worked on NodeJS Back End projects; later worked on WordPress/PHP/Gutenberg projects on both Front End and Back End.

work.name: WeDevUp, São Paulo - SP
work.summary: Full Stack Developer focused mostly on Front End with ReactJS. Worked on several projects, including a landing page for Ford and a clothing marketplace, plus Barraca Livre (an Airbnb-like platform for camping).

work.name: Centro de Inovação EDGE, Maceió - AL
work.summary: Worked with Mendix (low-code), JavaScript (Vanilla), and Java to build an internal system for Siemens (BRA).

work.name: Audora Technology and Solutions, Maceió - AL
work.summary: Developed systems with ReactJS using Redux and Hooks, TypeScript, and Java. Worked with agile methodologies (Scrum and Kanban Board) and tools such as Gitlab, BitBucket, and Jira.

work.name: Gama Academy
work.summary: 6-month Full Stack JavaScript program covering Soft Skills, HTML5, CSS3, Bootstrap, JavaScript, agile methodologies (Scrum, Kanban, Extreme Programming), NodeJS, TypeScript, ReactJS, and the Store framework by VTEX.

education.institution: Universidade Federal de Minas Gerais (UFMG), Belo Horizonte - MG
Universidade Federal de Alagoas (UFAL), Maceió - AL

awards.title: Winner of the Pilar Startup Challenge Hackathon
Winner of the Hiring Coders 2020 Hackathon
awards.awarder: Gama Academy, Amazon AWS, and VTEX
awards.summary: Member of the winning team (Team Potatoes). The Hiring Coders Program had over 15,000 applicants; the 6-month training covered Full Stack JavaScript (ReactJS, TypeScript, NodeJS, VTEX IO).
